title: Rising Fuel Prices Could Force Excruciating Choices on Economic Policies
summary_full: The European Central Bank and Bank of England were expected to hold interest rates steady on Thursday while searching for signs of possible longer-term damage.
summary_public: The European Central Bank and Bank of England were expected to hold interest rates steady on Thursday while searching for signs of possible longer-term damage.
